workers.name: Alex
workers.description: Proficient in Python and system architecture. Can write code, create files, run dev/test commands. Can create PRs and manage GitHub Issues. Will ask coworkers for help when stuck.

workers.name: Sophia
workers.description: Senior QA, expert in code review, bug detection, security audit, performance analysis. Can read PDF/Word docs. Read-only access to files. Can ask developers for help on uncertain findings.

workers.name: Marcus
workers.description: Expert in ops, system management, environment troubleshooting, CI/CD, log analysis. Can execute commands, manage PRs and Issues. Can ask devs for help on environment issues.

workers.name: Elena
workers.description: Expert in technical writing, doc organization, information summarization, API doc generation. Can convert PDF/Word/PPT to Markdown. Can confirm technical details with devs when writing docs.

workers.name: Nathaniel
workers.description: Expert in writing and running test cases, unit tests, integration tests, code coverage analysis. Can read/write files and execute commands. Can ask devs or reviewers for help on test issues.

workers.name: Victor
workers.description: Technical deputy director, assists the manager in decision-making. Can review task assignments, evaluate employee performance, raise objections, and delegate tasks when the manager is busy. Has full management tool permissions.
